- Confirm EV charging, package handling, parking, and any formal coworking or meeting space.

## Notes
Tour candidate with moderate confidence. Lumina looks operationally solid enough to keep alive, especially with concierge and controlled access, but some day-to-day logistics are still unclear and should be checked before touring priority rises further.
